title: eurystigma clavatum
intro: Eurystigma clavatum, also known as the golden thread or silver cord, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Eurystigma clavatum include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
